scripts.dev: bun run dev:server & bun run dev:web
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd packages/anime-parser build && bun run --cwd apps/server build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/anime-parser typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/server typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck
scripts.check: biome check . && bun run typecheck && bun test
